cells.xml_text_content: Changes in Producer Price Indexes, 2022 through 2025
cells.pdf_text_content: Changes in Producer Price Indexes, 2022 through 2025

cells.xml_text_content: Note: The most recent forecast was published on October 25, 2024. The next forecast will be published on November 25, 2024.
cells.pdf_text_content: Note: The most recent forecast was published on October 25, 2024. The next forecast will be published on November 25, 2024.

cells.xml_text_content: 1. Forecasts are grouped in three columns by the lower-bound, midpoint, and upper-bound of the prediction interval.
cells.pdf_text_content: 1. Forecasts are grouped in three columns by the lower-bound, midpoint, and upper-bound of the prediction interval.

cells.xml_text_content: 2. Each cell represents the percent-change range for each point in the forecast.
cells.pdf_text_content: 2. Each cell represents the percent-change range for each point in the forecast.

cells.xml_text_content: Source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Producer Price Indexes (not seasonally adjusted) and forecasts by USDA, Economic Research Service.
cells.pdf_text_content: Source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Producer Price Indexes (not seasonally adjusted) and forecasts by USDA, Economic Research Service.

cells.xml_text_content: Megan Sweitzer, megan.sweitzer@usda.gov or Victoria Davidenko, victoria.davidenko@usda.gov.
cells.pdf_text_content: Megan Sweitzer, megan.sweitzer@usda.gov or Victoria Davidenko, victoria.davidenko@usda.gov.
